example_reviews: LOVE THIS APP!!! I use the free version instead of the paid one and I still love it. Would I like to try the paid part? Yes, but the free part is honestly amazing. I've tried keeping track of my moods before and it didn't work for me. My friend told me about this app and I'm in love with it. Easy to use. Helpful. I would recommend this app to everyone.
This is such a good app. The questions are really good and I love looking at the insights to have an good view of what my week was like.
Its helps me keep track of my moods.
This app helps you keep track of your mood.
this is really good app I really like it
it's helping me with my mental health
This helpes me si much specially in my daily mental health.
